itinerary.title: Arrival and Ooty Lake Boating
itinerary.description: Arrive in Ooty, transfer to your hotel, and check in. In the afternoon, enjoy a relaxing boat ride on the scenic Ooty Lake.

itinerary.title: Nilgiri Mountain Railway Train Ride
itinerary.description: Experience the enchanting Nilgiri Mountain Railway toy train journey, a UNESCO-listed marvel, winding through the Western Ghats.

itinerary.title: Tea Gardens & Ooty Tea Museum Visit
itinerary.description: Explore local tea gardens. Visit the Ooty Tea Museum to learn about tea processing and enjoy fresh tea tastings.

itinerary.title: Ooty Botanical Gardens & Doddabetta Peak
itinerary.description: Visit the lush Ooty Botanical Gardens to see diverse flora. In the afternoon, drive up to Doddabetta Peak for sweeping views of the valleys.

itinerary.title: Ooty Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy a final breakfast and transfer back to the Coimbatore airport or railway station.

title: Ooty: Blue Hills & Tea Gardens Retreat
description: Discover the colonial charm and scenic grandeur of the Nilgiri Hills. Ride the historic, UNESCO-listed Nilgiri Mountain Railway toy train as it winds past tea gardens and deep ravines. Learn the secrets of tea production at the Ooty Tea Museum, take a quiet rowboat out on Ooty Lake, and explore the rich floral diversity of the Botanical Gardens before standing atop Doddabetta Peak to witness panoramic views of the Blue Mountains.
highlights: Ride the historic, UNESCO-listed Nilgiri Mountain Railway Toy Train
Guided tea estate walks and tastings at the Ooty Tea Museum
Scenic rowboat cruise on the peaceful waters of Ooty Lake
Stroll through the beautifully manicured Ooty Botanical Gardens
Stand atop Doddabetta Peak, the highest point in South India, for stunning views
Explore colonial-era architecture and historical stone buildings
